co.crystaldev.alpinecore.util

Class Components

  • java.lang.Object
    • co.crystaldev.alpinecore.util.Components

  • public final class Components
extends java.lang.Object
    Utility for interacting with Adventure Component objects.
    Since:
    0.1.0
    See Also:
    Text (Chat Components)

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static void broadcast(net.kyori.adventure.text.Component... components)
      Send a variable number of components to all online players.
      static @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.text.Component join(net.kyori.adventure.text.Component... components)
      Joins a variable number of components together with no joiner.

      Joins a variable number of components together with no joiner.

      Joins a variable number of components together with a single new line as a joiner.

      Joins a variable number of components together with a single new line as a joiner.

      Joins a variable number of components together with a single space as a joiner.

      Joins a variable number of components together with a single space as a joiner.
      static @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.text.Component reset()
      Constructs a component that can be used to reset all existing styling.

      Send a variable number of components to a variable number of receivers.

      Send a variable number of components to a receiver.
